baselines.name: fixed_neutral_mode
baselines.description: Two neutral (midpoint) runs — measures noise floor. Persona module is working if agent divergence >> baseline.

notes: Total agent runs: 196; Total LLM cost: $0.31; Cost caps: per-turn=$0.10, total=$80.00; Mean response length: exec=999 chars, anal=1010 chars; Wilcoxon p=0.2301 (agent > baseline)
data_filter: All queries synthetic; no OOS data boundary involved. Fresh agent instance per run (no memory carryover). Embedding model: hash-fallback (non-semantic).
